req.title: Search patients (negative)

"""
Patient Search Test Suite
Requirement: A clinician shall search patients by name, MRN, or DOB;
only patients in their care shall be returned.
Covers: happy paths, permission denial, missing mandatory elements,
and conflicting state transitions.
"""

from datetime import date, datetime, timedelta
from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch, PropertyMock

    pass

    pass

class InvalidSearchParameterError(Exception):
    pass

class ConflictingStateError(Exception):
    pass

class AmbiguousSearchError(Exception):
    pass

# Fixtures
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

def make_patient():
    """Factory for creating patient dictionaries."""

        patient_id=None,
        first_name="Jane",
        last_name="Doe",
        mrn=None,
        dob=date(1985, 6, 15),
        status="active",
        assigned_clinician_id=None,
    ):
        return {
            "patient_id": patient_id or str(uuid4()),
            "first_name": first_name,
            "last_name": last_name,
            "full_name": f"{first_name} {last_name}",
            "mrn": mrn or f"MRN-{uuid4().hex[:8].upper()}",
            "dob": dob,
            "status": status,
            "assigned_clinician_id": assigned_clinician_id,
        }
    return _factory
